theorem:  merge_sorted
sample:   0
attempt:  fix_3

[proof]
induction xs with
| nil =>
  simp [merge]
  exact sys
| cons a xs ih =>
  cases ys with
  | nil =>
    simp [merge]
    exact sxs
  | cons y ys =>
    cases xs with
    | nil =>
      cases ys with
      | nil =>
        simp [merge]
        by_cases h : a < y
        · simp [h]
          apply Sorted.cons
          · exact Sorted.singleton
          · intro hy
            exact lt_irrefl a (lt_trans h hy)
        · simp [h]
          apply Sorted.cons
          · exact Sorted.singleton
          · exact h
      | cons z zs =>
        simp [merge]
        by_cases h : a < y
        · simp [h]
          apply Sorted.cons
          · exact sys
          · intro hy
            exact lt_irrefl a (lt_trans h hy)
        · by_cases haz : a < z
          · simp [h, haz]
            apply Sorted.cons
            · exact Sorted.singleton
            · exact h
          · simp [h, haz]
            apply Sorted.cons
            · exact lemma_hint_5 y z zs sys
            · exact lemma_hint_21 y z zs sys
    | cons b xs' =>
      simp [merge]
      by_cases h : a < y
      · by_cases hby : b < y
        · simp [h, hby]
          apply Sorted.cons
          · apply ih
            · exact lemma_hint_5 a b xs' sxs
            · exact sys
          · intro hm
            exact lt_irrefl a (lt_trans h hm)
        · simp [h, hby]
          apply Sorted.cons
          · apply Sorted.cons
            · apply ih
              · exact lemma_hint_5 a b xs' sxs
              · exact sys
            · exact hby
          · intro hm
            exact lt_irrefl a (lt_trans h hm)
      · cases ys with
        | nil =>
          simp [h]
          apply Sorted.cons
          · exact sxs
          · exact h
        | cons z zs =>
          by_cases haz : a < z
          · simp [h, haz]
            apply Sorted.cons
            · apply ih
              · exact sxs
              · exact lemma_hint_5 y z zs sys
            · intro hm
              exact h hm
          · simp [h, haz]
            apply Sorted.cons
            · apply Sorted.cons
              · apply ih
                · exact sxs
                · exact lemma_hint_5 y z zs sys
              · exact lemma_hint_21 y z zs sys
            · intro hm
              exact lemma_hint_21 y z (merge (a :: b :: xs') zs) (Sorted.cons (ih sxs (lemma_hint_5 y z zs sys)) hm)

[lean error]
location:
                  apply Sorted.cons
                  · exact Sorted.singleton
                         ^
                  · exact h
error: typeclass instance problem is stuck
  LT ?m.212
Note: Lean will not try to resolve this typeclass instance problem because the type argument to `LT` is a metavariable. This argument must be fully determined before Lean will try to resolve the typeclass.
Hint: Adding type annotations and supplying implicit arguments to functions can give Lean more information for typeclass resolution. For example, if you have a variable `x` that you intend to be a `Nat`, but Lean reports it as having an unresolved type like `?m`, replacing `x` with `(x : Nat)` can get typeclass resolution un-stuck.

location:
                  apply Sorted.cons
                  · exact lemma_hint_5 y z zs sys
                   ^
                  · exact lemma_hint_21 y z zs sys
error: Type mismatch
  lemma_hint_5 y z zs sys
has type
  Sorted (z :: zs)
but is expected to have type
  Sorted (z :: merge [a] zs)

location:
                apply Sorted.cons
                · apply ih
                 ^
                  · exact lemma_hint_5 a b xs' sxs
error: Tactic `apply` failed: could not unify the conclusion of `ih`
  Sorted (merge (b :: xs') (y :: ys))
with the goal
  Sorted (b :: merge xs' (y :: ys))
Note: The full type of `ih` is
  Sorted (b :: xs') → Sorted (merge (b :: xs') (y :: ys))
case pos.a
T : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Preorder T
inst✝ : DecidableRel LT.lt
a y : T
ys : List T
sys : Sorted (y :: ys)
b : T
xs' : List T
sxs : Sorted (a :: b :: xs')
ih : Sorted (b :: xs') → Sorted (merge (b :: xs') (y :: ys))
h : a < y
hby : b < y
⊢ Sorted (b :: merge xs' (y :: ys))

location:
                · intro hm
                  exact lt_irrefl a (lt_trans h hm)
                                               ^
              · simp [h, hby]
error: Application type mismatch: The argument
  hm
has type
  b < a
but is expected to have type
  y < a
in the application
  lt_trans h hm

location:
                apply Sorted.cons
                · apply Sorted.cons
                 ^
                  · apply ih
error: Tactic `apply` failed: could not unify the conclusion of `@Sorted.cons`
  Sorted (?a :: ?b :: ?xs)
with the goal
  Sorted (y :: merge (b :: xs') ys)
Note: The full type of `@Sorted.cons` is
  ∀ {T : Type ?u.15422} [inst : LT T] {a b : T} {xs : List T}, Sorted (b :: xs) → ¬b < a → Sorted (a :: b :: xs)
case neg.a
T : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Preorder T
inst✝ : DecidableRel LT.lt
a y : T
ys : List T
sys : Sorted (y :: ys)
b : T
xs' : List T
sxs : Sorted (a :: b :: xs')
ih : Sorted (b :: xs') → Sorted (merge (b :: xs') (y :: ys))
h : a < y
hby : ¬b < y
⊢ Sorted (y :: merge (b :: xs') ys)

location:
                simp [h]
                apply Sorted.cons
               ^
                · exact sxs
error: Tactic `apply` failed: could not unify the conclusion of `@Sorted.cons`
  Sorted (?a :: ?b :: ?xs)
with the goal
  Sorted (y :: merge (a :: b :: xs') [])
Note: The full type of `@Sorted.cons` is
  ∀ {T : Type ?u.15588} [inst : LT T] {a b : T} {xs : List T}, Sorted (b :: xs) → ¬b < a → Sorted (a :: b :: xs)
case neg.nil
T : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Preorder T
inst✝ : DecidableRel LT.lt
a y b : T
xs' : List T
sxs : Sorted (a :: b :: xs')
h : ¬a < y
sys : Sorted [y]
ih : Sorted (b :: xs') → Sorted (merge (b :: xs') [y])
⊢ Sorted (y :: merge (a :: b :: xs') [])

                · simp [h, haz]
                  apply Sorted.cons
                 ^
                  · apply ih
error: Tactic `apply` failed: could not unify the conclusion of `@Sorted.cons`
  Sorted (?a :: ?b :: ?xs)
with the goal
  Sorted (y :: merge (a :: b :: xs') (z :: zs))
Note: The full type of `@Sorted.cons` is
  ∀ {T : Type ?u.15734} [inst : LT T] {a b : T} {xs : List T}, Sorted (b :: xs) → ¬b < a → Sorted (a :: b :: xs)
case pos
T : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Preorder T
inst✝ : DecidableRel LT.lt
a y b : T
xs' : List T
sxs : Sorted (a :: b :: xs')
h : ¬a < y
z : T
zs : List T
sys : Sorted (y :: z :: zs)
ih : Sorted (b :: xs') → Sorted (merge (b :: xs') (y :: z :: zs))
haz : a < z
⊢ Sorted (y :: merge (a :: b :: xs') (z :: zs))

                  apply Sorted.cons
                 ^
                  · apply Sorted.cons
